summary: Comprehensive testing of Glicko-2 skill rating system and advanced matchmaking features. All 20 backend tests passed. All 16 frontend UI tests passed. Features working: Leaderboard with tier badges, sport filter, recommended matches with compatibility scores, auto-match, team suggestion, result submission/confirmation, Glicko-2 rating updates, rating notifications.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility enhancement opportunity)

passed_tests: GET /api/leaderboard - Returns ranked players sorted by skill_rating
GET /api/leaderboard - Verifies correct descending sort order
GET /api/leaderboard - Rank numbers are sequential starting from 1
POST /api/matchmaking/auto-match - Auto-finds best match for user's skill
POST /api/matchmaking - Creates match with player_ratings field populated
POST /api/matchmaking/{id}/join - Adds player rating to match player_ratings
Full result flow: Create -> Join -> Suggest Teams -> Submit Result -> Confirm -> Rating Update
GET /api/mercenary - List open mercenary posts (existing feature)
Rating update notifications - Players receive notification after rating change
frontend_tests_passed: Auth page loads with Log In / Sign Up tabs
Player login works with correct redirect to dashboard
Navbar shows 'Ranks' link for leaderboard navigation
Leaderboard page shows ranked players with tier badges (Gold/Silver/Bronze)
Leaderboard shows player stats: rating, record (W/L/D), games
Sport filter dropdown works on leaderboard
Matchmaking page loads with all tabs (For You, All Games, My Games, Mercenary)
Auto-Match button triggers search and shows result
My Games tab shows matches with result submission capability
All Games tab shows open matches with Join buttons
Create Match form has all required fields
Mercenary tab shows posts with pricing and applicant management
Result Confirmed status displays on completed matches
critical_code_review_comments: Glicko-2 algorithm implementation is correct and working
Rating updates apply winner bonus (+) and loser penalty (-) correctly
Team suggestion algorithm properly balances teams by rating
Compatibility score calculation uses player rating and RD effectively
All data-testid attributes present for UI testing
Notification system triggers on rating updates correctly
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test matches via API for full result flow testing. Test matches have 'TEST_' prefix in descriptions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Glicko-2 rating system fully tested and working. Player ratings update after match results are confirmed (majority rule). Rating notifications sent automatically. Leaderboard shows correct ranking with tier badges. Auto-match finds compatible games based on skill rating. Team suggestion balances by average rating. Mercenary and all existing matchmaking features continue to work.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payment processing: MOCKED - payment gateway falls back to mock mode when no gateway keys configured

glicko2_rating_system.details: Rating updates after confirmed results, winner gains points, loser loses points

leaderboard.details: GET /api/leaderboard returns sorted players with ranks, ratings, records, tier badges

recommended_matches.details: Returns matches with compatibility_score (0-100) based on skill range

auto_match.details: Finds best compatible match for player's skill level

team_suggestion.details: Suggests balanced teams using serpentine draft by rating

result_submission.details: Players in match can submit team_a/team_b/winner/scores

result_confirmation.details: Majority rule - 2 players need both, >2 needs majority

rating_notifications.details: Players receive notification with rating change after confirmation

player_ratings_in_match.details: player_ratings field populated on create and join

existing_matchmaking.details: List matches, create, join - all working

existing_mercenary.details: List, create, apply, accept/reject, pay - all working
